meta.title: App Overview
meta.excerpt: Production-ready Next.js 15 architecture with atomic design and 7-layer security

seo.metaDescription: Production-ready Next.js 15 architecture with atomic design and 7-layer security

props.title: Next.js 15 Enterprise Architecture
props.body: Production-ready application featuring atomic design components, guard pattern hydration protection, and a comprehensive 7-layer security stack. This is a complete, scalable foundation for modern applications.

props.text: The application uses atomic design principles across 4 distinct layers, each serving a specific architectural purpose.

features.title: Atoms (10)
features.description: Foundational inputs, buttons, badges, icons - fully composed, zero dependencies on context

features.title: Molecules (14)
features.description: Form controls, cards, navigation items - combine atoms into reusable patterns

features.title: Organisms (10)
features.description: Complex containers, multi-step forms, page layouts - compose molecules for full features

features.title: Guard Pattern
features.description: Hydration protection layer preventing mismatches between server and client renders

features.title: Server State - TanStack Query
features.description: Automatic caching, invalidation, and synchronization of server data with stale-while-revalidate strategy

features.title: UI State - React Context
features.description: Theme, modals, and UI preferences managed through Context API with zero prop drilling

features.title: Type Safety - Zod Schemas
features.description: Runtime validation ensures data contracts between client and server are always met

features.title: Form State - React Hook Form
features.description: Performant form state management with minimal re-renders and built-in error handling

rows: Code splitting, lazy loading, work scheduling

props.text: Defense-in-depth architecture with 7 independent security layers, each protecting against different attack vectors.

steps.title: IP-Based Rate Limiting
steps.description: Prevent brute force and denial-of-service attacks at network edge

steps.title: CSRF Token Validation
steps.description: Verify request origin for state-changing operations using secure tokens

steps.title: Input Sanitization
steps.description: Clean user input with DOMPurify before processing or storage

steps.title: Hydration Guard Protection
steps.description: Prevent XSS and data leakage through hydration mismatch exploits

steps.title: Server Action Validation
steps.description: Runtime validation of all server actions using Zod schemas

steps.title: SQL Injection Prevention
steps.description: Parameterized queries and ORM-level protection in database layer

steps.title: XSS Protection
steps.description: Content Security Policy headers and DOM sanitization

props.title: Enterprise-Ready Foundation
props.content: This architecture provides production-grade reliability, security, and performance. The atomic component system enables rapid feature development while the 7-layer security stack protects against modern attack vectors.
